input.instructions: Search theoretical physics literature (arXiv, journals) for the 'classicality of single-photon Hawking radiation'. Identify the three universal dimensionless constants that govern this classicality. Look for parameters related to photon statistics, squeezing, or the quantum-to-classical transition in curved spacetime. Provide the exact numerical values for these three constants.

orchestration.decision_notes: I need to search for literature regarding the classicality of single-photon Hawking radiation to identify the three universal dimensionless constants requested.
